warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Staff Only: Penalty Points). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved
criteria.description: Shows comprehension of the simulated scenario and identifies the issue(s) that require resolution.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Neither a summary of the role play nor any problems were presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Offers a summary of the role play OR identifies the issue(s).

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Presents a summary of the role play AND identifies the issue(s).

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Exhibits a thorough grasp of the role play summary AND the identified issue(s).

criteria.name: Identifies alternatives and the pro(s) and con(s) of each
criteria.description: Presents various options and evaluates the advantages and disadvantages associated with each one.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No different options were put forward.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more options were suggested, but their benefits and/or drawbacks were not examined.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A minimum of two options were presented, with an analysis of their benefits and drawbacks.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several different options were provided, and numerous advantages and disadvantages for each were thoroughly examined.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation
criteria.description: Determines a sensible resolution and outlines the elements involved in putting it into practice.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No resolution was proposed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A resolution was offered, but a strategy for its execution was not created.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A reasonable resolution and a detailed plan for its execution were presented.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical resolution and a comprehensive plan for its execution were created, along with an identification of required resources.

criteria.name: Demonstrates knowledge and understanding of the event knowledge areas: Business Plan, Community and business relations, legal issues, initial capital and credit, personnel management, financial management, marketing management, taxes, government regulations
criteria.description: Exhibits familiarity with and comprehension of the specified subject areas for the event: Business Plan, Community and business relations, legal issues, initial capital and credit, personnel management, financial management, marketing management, taxes, and government regulations.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No understanding of the knowledge areas was shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding of one or two knowledge areas was demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding of three knowledge areas was demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding of four or more knowledge areas was demonstrated.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated
criteria.description: The presented information is structured effectively and communicated with clarity.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) did not appear ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) were ready, but the delivery lacked a coherent progression.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a coherent order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a coherent order, and the statements were well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.
criteria.description: Consistently exhibits self-assurance, composed body language, engaging eye contact, and effective vocal delivery.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified presentation skills were shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified skills (self-assurance, body language, eye contact, or vocal delivery) were shown.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified skills (self-assurance, body language, eye contact, or vocal delivery) were shown.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All specified skills were shown, enhancing the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Shows the capability to respond to inquiries in an effective manner.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Unable to provide answers to questions.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Does not fully address the questions asked.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Provides complete answers to questions.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Engaged with the judges while providing complete answers to questions.
